case.no_active: No active recovery cases were found.

codex.filesystem.ntfs.warning: Do not run CHKDSK before imaging.
codex.filesystem.ntfs.recommended_action: Create an image before repair attempts.
codex.filesystem.vfat.warning: FAT filesystems are vulnerable to corruption after unsafe removal.
codex.filesystem.vfat.risk: Directory and allocation table damage may affect recovery.
codex.filesystem.vfat.recommended_action: Image the device before repair or write operations.
codex.filesystem.ext4.warning: Mounting ext4 may replay the journal and modify metadata.
codex.filesystem.ext4.risk: Filesystem metadata may change after mounting.
codex.filesystem.ext4.recommended_action: Prefer read-only access before recovery work.
oracle.step.stop_no_recovery: Do not perform any recovery operation.
oracle.step.recover_on_image: Perform recovery on the image, not the original device.
oracle.recovery.photorec_only: PhotoRec is currently the only integrated recovery method.
smart.title: SMART
janus.title: JANUS
janus.reason.recovery_engine_destination: Recovery Engine cannot be used as a recovery destination.
janus.reason.not_mounted: Destination is not mounted or has no writable mount point.
mount.descendants.title: Mounted descendants:
mount.warning.os_modify: Mounted filesystems on the source disk may be modified by the operating system during imaging.
mount.prompt.unmount: Should Sentinel unmount these filesystems before imaging? [y/N]:
mount.refused.title: IMAGING REFUSED
mount.refused.descendants_remain: Mounted descendants remain on the source disk.
imaging.refused.title: IMAGING REFUSED
imaging.refused.canonical_preserved: The canonical forensic image and SHA-256 fingerprint are already preserved.
imaging.refused.manual_investigation: Manual investigation is required before any imaging action.
imaging.refused.no_overwrite: Sentinel will not resume, overwrite, or delete the existing artifacts.
imaging.fingerprint.title: FINGERPRINT RETRY
imaging.fingerprint.missing: Imaging is complete. SHA-256 fingerprint has not been recorded.
imaging.fingerprint.no_rerun: Sentinel will record the fingerprint now. ddrescue will not run again.
imaging.resume.title: RESUME FORENSIC IMAGING
imaging.new.title: NEW FORENSIC IMAGING
imaging.ddrescue.continue: ddrescue will continue using the existing source.img and source.map.

testdisk.error.not_configured: TestDisk is not configured; add a 'testdisk' block to sentinel_config.json to enable it.
testdisk.error.output_check_failed: Could not inspect the TestDisk recovery output directory: {error}
testdisk.error.log_check_failed: Could not inspect the TestDisk evidence log: {error}
testdisk.confirm.working_exists: A working copy already exists and will be replaced: {path}
testdisk.confirm.output_exists: Recovered artifacts already exist and will be preserved; TestDisk will keep using this directory: {path}
testdisk.prompt.reuse_output: Continue using the existing recovery output directory? [y/N]:
testdisk.confirm.log_exists: An evidence log already exists: {path}. TestDisk's exact append/truncate behavior has not yet been reference-host validated; the log will not be cleared or rotated.
testdisk.prompt.reuse_log: Continue with the existing evidence log in place? [y/N]:
testdisk.recovery.title: RECOVERY
photorec.guidance.title: PHOTOREC GUIDANCE
photorec.filesystem.ext: Filesystem type : Choose {filesystem} when PhotoRec asks for the filesystem.
photorec.filesystem.other: Filesystem type : Choose Other when PhotoRec asks for the filesystem.
photorec.scan.title: Scan mode options:
photorec.scan.free: Free  : Scan unallocated space for deleted files when filesystem metadata is usable.
photorec.scan.whole: Whole : Scan the full partition when damaged, reformatted, or uncertain.
photorec.select_mode: Select Free or Whole inside PhotoRec based on the case.
photorec.recovery.title: RECOVERY
recovery.result.title: RECOVERY RESULT
summary.title: SUMMARY
report.format.prompt.title: SELECT REPORT FORMAT
report.format.customer.prompt.title: SELECT CUSTOMER REPORT FORMAT
report.format.customer.prompt.select: Select customer report format [1-3, Enter for {default}]:
report.error.customer_not_completed: Customer report generation requires a completed case.
report.error.manifest_read_failed: Customer report generation failed: case manifest could not be read.
report.pdf.error.dependency: PDF export is unavailable: the ReportLab library is not installed.
report.pdf.error.font: PDF export failed: a required font could not be loaded.
report.pdf.error.rendering: PDF export failed while rendering the document.
report.language.prompt.title: SELECT REPORT LANGUAGE
report.field.name: Name
report.customer.imaging.completed: A complete forensic image of the device was created.
report.customer.imaging.not_completed: The forensic image of the device was not completed.
report.customer.imaging.not_performed: No forensic image of the device was created.
report.customer.outcome.successful: The requested data was recovered successfully.
report.customer.outcome.partial: Some of the requested data was recovered.
report.customer.outcome.unsuccessful: The requested data could not be recovered.
report.customer.outcome.not_recorded: No recovery outcome has been recorded.
report.customer.recommendation.1: Verify that the recovered data is complete and opens correctly before relying on it.
report.customer.recommendation.2: Contact us if you find missing or unreadable files in the recovered data.
report.customer.recommendation.3: Keep at least two independent backups of important data in separate locations.
report.customer.recommendation.4: Store recovered data on a different device from the one that was recovered.
report.customer.disclaimer.1: This report summarizes the data recovery work performed for your case.
report.customer.disclaimer.2: Data recovery cannot be guaranteed, and results depend on the condition of the device.
report.customer.disclaimer.3: You are responsible for verifying the recovered data and maintaining your own backups.
report.customer.disclaimer.4: Recovered data is retained according to our data retention policy and is then securely removed.
delivery.label.finalized: Recovery work finalized. Case status is now COMPLETED.
delivery.outcome.title: RECOVERY OUTCOME
route.status.finalized: Recovery work was previously finalized for this case.
route.status.paused: Work is paused for this case.
error.assessment_missing: Cannot continue {workflow_name}: persisted assessment is missing from case.json.
error.source_missing: Source device is not connected. Connect the source device and open the case again.
error.audit_log_failed: WARNING: An audit log entry could not be recorded. The operation itself may still have completed. Check the case audit log and its storage location.
load.message.case_path_not_accessible: Recovery case path is not accessible: {case_path}
load.message.source_size_bytes_not_recor: Pre-acquisition source match refused: exact size_bytes is not recorded in case.json.
load.message.source_not_connected: Source device is not connected or could not be matched using {identity_source}.
load.message.ambiguous_source: Ambiguous source device match. Multiple candidates: {candidate_paths}
load.message.destination_not_connected: Destination Recovery Storage is not mounted or could not be matched to the persisted destination device.
load.message.ambiguous_destination: Ambiguous destination device match. Multiple candidates: {candidate_paths}
load.message.destination_not_mounted: Matched destination device is present but not mounted.
archive.message.relocate_local_not_found: Local recovery case folder not found.
archive.message.acquisition_inconsistent: Inconsistent acquisition artifacts: {present} exists but {missing} is missing.
archive.message.acquisition_completed_ca: Canonical acquisition is complete and fingerprint exists.
archive.message.acquisition_fingerprint_: Imaging is complete but SHA-256 fingerprint is missing.
archive.message.acquisition_incomplete_d: Incomplete ddrescue acquisition may be resumed.
archive.message.identity_size_undetermin: Resume refused: current source size could not be determined.
archive.message.identity_size_mismatch: Resume refused: source size_bytes does not match acquisition_source.json.
archive.message.identity_serial_mismatch: Resume refused: source serial does not match acquisition_source.json.
archive.message.identity_serial_unstable: Resume refused: serial identity is missing or unstable.
archive.message.identity_serial_unavaila: Resume refused: trustworthy serial identity is unavailable.
archive.message.identity_model_mismatch: Resume refused: source model does not match acquisition_source.json.
archive.message.identity_path_changed: Source path changed from {recorded_path} to {current_path}; serial and size_bytes match.
archive.message.acquisition_source_exist: acquisition_source.json already exists and is immutable.
archive.message.acquisition_source_size_: Source size_bytes could not be determined for acquisition evidence.
archive.message.imaging_resume_refused_c: Resume refused: canonical acquisition is complete.
Resume refused: imaging is already complete.
archive.message.imaging_resume_refused_m: Resume refused: ddrescue map is unreadable.
archive.message.imaging_resume_refused_i: Resume refused: acquisition artifacts are inconsistent.
archive.message.imaging_refused_canonica: Imaging refused: canonical acquisition is complete.
archive.message.imaging_refused_map_unre: Imaging refused: ddrescue map is unreadable.
archive.message.imaging_refused_inconsis: Imaging refused: acquisition artifacts are inconsistent.
archive.message.imaging_refused_mounted_: Imaging refused: mounted descendants remain on source disk: {mount_summary}
archive.message.imaging_resume_artifacts: Resume refused: source.img and source.map must both exist.
archive.message.imaging_resume_map_not_r: Resume refused: ddrescue map is not resumable.
archive.message.imaging_refused_artifact: Imaging refused: source.img and source.map must both be absent.
archive.message.integrity_image_not_foun: Forensic image not found. The image was not deleted.
archive.message.integrity_size_undetermi: Forensic image size could not be determined.
archive.message.integrity_read_failed: Forensic image could not be read completely.
archive.message.integrity_save_failed: Fingerprint evidence could not be saved.
archive.message.photorec_refused_origina: Refusing to run PhotoRec on the original device path.
archive.message.photorec_exit_code: PhotoRec session failed with exit code {exit_code}.
archive.message.unmount_failed: One or more descendant filesystems could not be unmounted.
archive.message.unmount_success: All requested descendant filesystems were unmounted.
